data.title: Eminent Gold Corp. expands HSRP claims by 370 hectares at Hot Springs Range Project in Humboldt County.
data.description: Eminent Gold Corp. has recently announced the acquisition of 370 hectares of new claims at the Hot Springs Range Project in Humboldt County. This endeavor is under the ownership of Eminent and brings the total land coverage to 100%. The project is located in Humboldt County and the new claims were staked as part of the expansion strategy. The company is listed as TSXV: EMNT, OTCQB: EMGDF, and FSE: 7AB. The newly acquired claims mark a significant development in the growth of Eminent's presence in the region.

data.title: BTQ Technologies added to VanEck Quantum Computing UCITS ETF, increasing European access. Company on Nasdaq, CBOE CA, FSE.
data.description: Vancouver-based BTQ Technologies Corp., a quantum technology company (Nasdaq: BTQ, CBOE CA: BTQ, FSE: NG3), specializing in network security, disclosed its inclusion in the VanEck Quantum. The news was revealed on Jan. 13, 2026.

data.title: Fast-growing AI startup, Fortiv expands to U.S. amidst uncertain world, aiding business continuity.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in New York, a Copenhagen-based AI-powered business continuity startup, Fortiv, has announced its official entry into the U.S. market. With growing uncertainty in the global business landscape, U.S. enterprises are seeking quicker ways to enhance resilience. This move by Fortiv offers a solution for businesses looking to adapt amidst challenging conditions.

data.title: Superorganism, a VC firm for biodiversity, closes their debut fund at $25.9M, aiming to redefine capital for biodiversity.
data.description: In New York on January 13, 2026, leading investors are supporting a new nature and technology fund that seeks to transform how capital supports biodiversity. Superorganism, the inaugural venture capital firm focused on technology-based approaches to biodiversity, has successfully concluded its first fund.

data.title: Blubrry Podcasting promotes MacKenzie Bennett to Director of Marketing and Dave Clements to Support role.
data.description: In Coopersville, Michigan on January 13, 2026, Blubrry Podcasting, a renowned independent podcast hosting and services company, revealed the promotions of two vital team members. MacKenzie Bennett has been appointed as the Director of Marketing, while Dave Clements has been elevated to the role of Support.

data.title: HOYA Vision Care introduces HOYA LensPreview™, virtual try-on for lenses, enhancing patient experience.
data.description: HOYA® Vision Care, a prominent player in ophthalmic lens technology, has introduced the HOYA LensPreview™ to enhance the patient experience. This innovation allows ECPs to showcase the true colors of HOYA lenses. The announcement was made in Lewisville, Texas, on January 13, 2026. HOYA aims to elevate the patient experience by providing accurate depictions of lens colors. This move signifies a significant step forward in ensuring a more informative and immersive experience for customers.

data.title: Ractigen Therapeutics starts Phase II trial for SOD1-ALS with RAG-17, first patient dosed. Initial dosing in Nantong, China.
data.description: In Nantong, China, on January 13, 2026, Ractigen Therapeutics shared that the Phase II clinical trial for RAG-17, a novel siRNA therapy aimed at treating SOD1-mutated amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), has started with the first patient being dosed. This development marks a significant milestone in the fight against ALS. The trial will involve administering the therapy to a total of[__] patients to assess its effectiveness and safety in managing this particular subtype of ALS. This significant progress offers hope to individuals suffering from this devastating disease, with the potential to revolutionize ALS treatment protocols.

data.title: HALO introduces "ARR Milestones" for customers with global license discounts, starting at ∼£100m ARR with 5% reduction.
data.description: An enterprise software vendor, not publicly traded, is implementing company-wide Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) benchmarks to provide clients with discounted global licensing rates on standard pricing. The initiative starts at around £100 million in ARR, offering a 5% reduction, with discounts compounding at each subsequent milestone. The program was launched in London on January 13, 2026.

data.title: Concentrix reports Q4 and fiscal year 2025 results, with revenue of $2,552.9M Q4 and $9,825.8M FY. Operating loss of $1,382.4M Q4 and $918.2M FY due to non-cash goodwill impairment charges. Company returned $258M to shareholders, forecasts revenue growth in 2026.
data.description: Concentrix Corporation reported financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ended November 30, 2025. They achieved revenue of $2.55 billion in the fourth quarter, a 4.3% increase year-on-year, with a total fiscal year revenue of $9.83 billion, a 2.2% increase year-on-year. Operating loss for the year was $918.2 million. They returned $258 million to shareholders through share repurchases and dividends in fiscal 2025, reducing net debt by $184 million. The company expects ongoing revenue growth and adjusted free cash flow expansion in 2026. They also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.36 per share and repurchased 1.3 million shares in the fourth quarter. For the first quarter of fiscal 2026, they expect revenue of $2.475 billion to $2.5 billion and non-GAAP diluted EPS of $2.57 to $2.69, with an effective tax rate of approximately 25%. For the full year 2026, they anticipate revenue of $10.035 billion to $10.18 billion and non-GAAP diluted EPS of $11.48 to $12.07, along with adjusted free cash flow of $630 million to $650 million.

data.title: TomaGold completes first 2 years of option agreement with CIM, to acquire 100% interest in multiple properties.
data.description: In Montreal, TOMAGOLD CORPORATION (TSXV: LOT; OTCPK: TOGOF) has successfully met all acquisition requirements for the initial two years of its option agreement with Chibougamau Independent Mines Inc. (TSXV: CBG) to secure full ownership of the Berrigan Mine, Berrigan South, Antoinette Lake, Élaine Lake, and Gwillim properties. This accomplishment solidifies their ownership of these promising properties.

data.title: Adair & Co appoints Kim Killian as new CRO from Jan 1, 2026, to scale client impact nationwide.
data.description: Kim Killian has been named the new Chief Revenue Officer (CRO) of Adair & Company, starting from January 1, 2026. This appointment signifies a strategic move for the organization as they aim to enhance their revenue-related operations with Killian's expertise. This decision is key for the company's future growth and financial performance.

data.title: 500+ students, parents, teachers to rally at Wisconsin Capitol for School Choice Week on Jan. 27. Voice support for educational options.
data.description: In Madison, Wisconsin, on January 27, 2026, over 500 students, parents, and teachers are set to gather at the Capitol to commemorate School Choice Week. The event aims to showcase the accomplishments of various educational options.

data.title: ICIS & ICE launch base oils futures contracts using ICIS benchmarks in London on Jan. 13, 2026 for risk management.
data.description: In a move aimed at introducing risk management tools to the market, Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), a major global player, is launching a new set of exchange-backed base oils futures contracts utilizing ICIS benchmarks. Prior to this initiative, the market primarily operated on a physical trading basis. The launch is scheduled in London on January 13, 2026. This new suite of futures contracts is expected to enhance the market's stability and offer users valuable hedging opportunities.

data.title: 450+ students, parents, teachers to celebrate school choice at Capitol event in Denver on Jan. 27.
data.description: In Denver on Tuesday, January 27th, 2026, over 450 students, parents, and teachers will come together at the Capitol to commemorate the achievements of school choice. They will be celebrating the opportunities provided by educational options.

data.title: Blackline Safety Corp introduces G8, the most connected safety wearable; offers gas detection, lone worker protection, and communication.
data.description: A company based in Calgary, Canada, that focuses on connected safety technology, Blackline Safety Corp. (TSX: BLN), revealed the latest innovation in worksite safety technology named G8. This wearable device represents the most connected creation from the company, integrating advanced gas detection, protection for lone workers, and high-quality communication capabilities. G8 is constructed as a comprehensive platform that unites workers among themselves, their safety teams, and the entire digital worksite. This rugged device serves as an all-in-one solution, offering a seamless connection to enhance safety measures at worksites.

data.title: TTE Strategy opens first office outside Europe in Dubai, expanding into Gulf Region to work with family businesses.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, TTE Strategy launched its inaugural office outside Europe in Dubai, UAE, marking its expansion into the Gulf Region. The consultancy's move aims to enhance its services for family businesses, private sector entities, and industrial clients. This significant development underscores TTE Strategy's commitment to broadening its global presence and catering to a wider client base beyond Europe.

data.title: TJX recalls Isla Rae Magnetic Wireless Chargers due to fire risk at Marshalls & T.J. Maxx; UBS raises price forecast from $181 to $193.
data.description: TJX Companies, Inc. has issued a safety recall for the Isla Rae Magnetic Wireless Chargers sold at Marshalls and T.J. Maxx stores, following a notice from the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission on January 8, 2026. The recall was initiated due to concerns that the chargers may rupture while in use, potentially causing fires or burns. UBS analyst Jay Sole, on the same day, upgraded the rating for TJX Companies, Inc. shares from Buy with a price target increase from $181 to $193. The affected phone accessory was available for purchase at the mentioned stores. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
